changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO categories (id, name, slug) VALUES ('cat-electronics', 'Electronics', 'electronics'); INSERT INTO categories (id, name, slug) VALUES ('cat-fashion', 'Fashion', 'fashion');

INSERT INTO inventory_item (id, sku, product_id, variant_id, quantity, available_quantity, reserved_quantity, low_stock_threshold, status, state_id, flow_id, tenant) VALUES ('inv-1a', 'WH-BLK-001', 'prod-1', 'var-1a', 50, 45, 5, 10, 'AVAILABLE', 'AVAILABLE', 'inventory-flow', 'homebase');

INSERT INTO warehouses (id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, city, state, max_capacity_units, current_utilization_pct, is_active, tenant, created_time) VALUES ('wh-1', 'BLR-FC1', 'Bangalore Fulfillment Center', 'FULFILLMENT_CENTER', 'Bangalore', 'Karnataka', 50000, 72.5, TRUE, 'homebase', NOW());
